title: Agreement Desk Request Management
text:
Learn about managing ​Docusign
Agreement Deskrequest types and request statuses.

As an account administrator, you can customize Agreement Desk settings to fit your
organization's needs. This includes custom request types and request statuses.

title: Agreement Desk Request Reports Dashboards
text:
Learn about the enhanced request report and the available dashboards that you can use for
your request data analysis.

The Agreement Desk Request Reports in the Reports tab now have
enhanced functionality. You can apply filters, view detailed reports, and download
data.

Docusign
Agreement Desk Reporting also provides deep insights into your overall
requests.

title: Agreement Desk Request Reports Dashboards
text:
You access request reports by selecting Insights in the global
navigation bar and select Requests from the left side
navigation menu.

title: Agreement Desk Request Reports Dashboards
text:
You can toggle the default chart display to a table. Accessing the chart's overflow
menu and select View as table.

![A screenshot of the Request Reports Overflow menu options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ac-rpt-overflow.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MzksInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.tyE1lB_9hq2Tk4Bk-zu0P8BhCjg06E8ANztyMUw3s2c&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Request Reports Overflow menu options.")

The Request Insights page features these primary display types to help you
analyze your data.

Completed Requests by Type

title: Agreement Desk Request Reports Dashboards
text:
To effectively analyze your team's efficiency, it helps to understand how the chart
processes different stages of a ticket's lifecycle.

- **Custom Statuses:** Workspace administrators can define tailored stages
  to match your team's workflow. For example, Legal
  Review, Ready for Review,
  On Hold, or Ready for
  Signature.
- **Chart Logic:** This chart only displays data for
  Closed requests. It retroactively calculates the
  exact number of days a completed request spent in each of its previous
  **Open** custom statuses. Active or open requests are excluded from
  this chart.

title: Restore a Deleted Custom Status
text:
Learn how to restore a custom request status that you deleted.

If after deleting a custom request status, you find that you need it, you can restore it.

1. Select Requests in the left navigation..
2. Select Settings  > Statuses.
3. Locate the status that you want to restore from the
   Deleted section. Select the arrow to the right.

   ![A screenshot showing how to restore a deletedAgreement Desk status.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-restore-del-status.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NjgsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.Won1so57zhuVUDZzIm4ZW1Sq2FG0ehSdJY7SlO54RQ0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing how to restore a deletedAgreement Desk status.")

The custom status is displayed in the list of open or closed
statuses.

title: Reorder Request Statuses
text:
Learn how to reorder the statuses in the Agreement Desk requests Status menu. The status at the top of your list is automatically set as the default for all newly created requests. This default can be easily changed; simply drag your desired status to the top of the list to make it the new default.

You can change the order that statuses are listed in the Agreement Desk
request Status menu.

The status at the top of your list is automatically set as the default for all newly created requests. You can change the default by dragging your desired status to the top of the list to make it the new default.

1. Select Requests.
2. Select Settings > Statuses.

   ![A screenshot of a sample AD Statuses page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-admin-reorder-status.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NTQsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.zr4-414KZHi6HO8Nu4k9Cd7P9zByjh3ot8Pdsc-abXE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample AD Statuses page.")
3. Select and hold the verticle lines on the left of a status and drag it to a new
   location in the list.

   ![A screenshot showing how to reorder a Agreement Desk status .](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-reorder-status.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NTQsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.zr4-414KZHi6HO8Nu4k9Cd7P9zByjh3ot8Pdsc-abXE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing how to reorder a Agreement Desk status .")

The statuses are reordered in the Status
list.

title: Create a Custom Request Status
text:
Learn how to create a custom status for Agreement Deskrequests.

If you need a status other than the default options provided by Agreement Desk, you can create one.

1. Select Requests to open the Requests dashboard.
2. Select Settings.
3. Select the Statuses tab.
4. Select Add Status.
5. Enter a name for the status.
6. (Optional) Select Closed for the Status type if the status applies to closed requests only.
7. Select an accent color and select Add.

The status you created is visible beneath its status type in the Statuses page.

title: Get Started with Administration for Docusign Agreement Desk
heading_path: Get Started with Administration for Docusign Agreement Desk
text:
Learn some basics about the Docusign Agreement Desk features.

As an Agreement Desk administrator, you can customize Agreement Desk settings to fit your organization's needs. For example, you can create custom statuses for requests, access and customize your organization's Agreement Desk email address, and manage user permissions.

By default, Agreement Desk is turned off. For users to access it, you must turn it on. Because it's off by default, you can roll out Agreement Desk to your organization when you are ready.

Agreement Desk is a collaboration tool designed to speed up the intake, review, and finalize agreements. With it, you'll be able to manage the entire agreement process, from request intake to contract review, negotiation, and approvals, all within Docusign.

As an Agreement Desk administrator, you can customize Agreement Desk to suit your organization's requirements and manage levels of user interaction. For example, you can:

- Create request statuses to specific business processes.
- Build workflows to specific business needs by configuring unique request types with corresponding metadata and statuses.
- Control access to requests based on user roles and groups, ensuring data security.
- Specify whether request submitters receive notifications when their submitted requests change.

title: Block Sending for Signatures for Outstanding Approvals
heading_path: Block Sending for Signatures for Outstanding Approvals
text:
Learn about how Agreement Desk administrators can restrict users from
manually sending documents for signature in Agreement Desk. Use this feature if approvals
are still pending or have been rejected.

Agreement Desk administrators can restrict users from manually
sending documents for signature in Agreement Desk.

This feature helps enforce that documents are only sent for signature after
stakeholders have officially approved.

Administrators can enable or disable this feature within Agreement Desk Admin settings.

1. Select Requests in the left navigation to access the
   Request Dashboard.
2. Select Settings > Admin.
3. In the  Approvals for sending a document for Signature
   section, toggle on the  "Send for Signature" in Agreement Desk if
   approvals are pending or rejected slider to enable blocking
   signatures.

   This feature is turned off by default.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement DeskApprovals for sending a document for signature feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-block-send-for-sig.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MjEsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.eyM06EDh7O008YYgEmxUb01-PDAy4E4BdxXfjxH_tgU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement DeskApprovals for sending a document for signature feature.")
4. In the confirmation dialog box, select Enable.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Enable blocking for manually sending for signature dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-block-confirm-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MjEsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.eyM06EDh7O008YYgEmxUb01-PDAy4E4BdxXfjxH_tgU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Enable blocking for manually sending for signature dialog box.")

   When
   enabled, documents in Agreement Desk cannot be manually sent for
   signature if there are pending or rejected approvals.

title: Configure a Custom Inbound Email Address for Messages﻿
heading_path: Configure a Custom Inbound Email Address for Messages﻿
text:
Learn how to configure a custom email address for yourAgreement Desk to
manage incoming and outgoing messages effectively.

title: Configure a Custom Inbound Email Address for Messages﻿
heading_path: Configure a Custom Inbound Email Address for Messages﻿
text:
Agreement Desk provides a dedicated email address for each account, such as
`requests.fontara@mail.docusign.net`. This address is used for all incoming
and outgoing messages, and is automatically set as the reply-to address for messages sent to
and from Agreement Desk.

If you want to use a custom email address from your own domain, for example
`agreements@yourcompany.com`, you can
configure Agreement Desk to use it.

Follow the instructions to configure Agreement Desk to use your custom email
address:

1. Set up forwarding from your custom email address to your
   Agreement Desk account.
   1. Set up email forwarding from your custom email address to your Agreement Desk email address in either Google Groups or Outlook
      Groups.
   2. Create a Google or Outlook email group with the
      address that you want to use (for example,
      `requests@fontara.com`). Ensure that the group
      allows you to add a user with an external
      domain.
   3. Add your default Agreement Desk email address (for example,
      `requests.fontara@mail.docusign.net`) to the group. Ensure that this
      email address is the only member of the group. To find the email address, see the
      topic [Locate Your Docusign Agreement Desk Email
      Address](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5&topicId=xlg1741793314719.html&_LANG=enus "Learn where to find the default email alias provided by Agreement Desk.").
   4. Ensure that the group is set up correctly. Send
      an email to the new group and verify that it is
      forwarded to Agreement Desk.
2. Customize the default email address, specify the address you want to use in the
   Customize your email address section.
   1. Select Settings > Email.
3. In the Email Configuration section, you can edit the default
   email address and email name for outgoing email messages.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Email Address and Email Name that you can update.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-locate-email.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NDgsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.fR7KhwLE_6hWVW-hTaCBHSYfCPgLNwmdbP1AEeQK--M&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Email Address and Email Name that you can update.")

Your provided default email address will still be active if you add a custom email
address.

title: Enable External Participation in Agreement Desk
heading_path: Enable External Participation in Agreement Desk
text: Learn what options administrators have for customizing the use of email associated with your account and external participation in Agreement Desk .

title: Enable External Participation in Agreement Desk
heading_path: Enable External Participation in Agreement Desk
text:
As an administrator, you have several options related to the email used for your account and external participation in Agreement Desk .

- Permit external participants (those outside of your Docusign account)to
  submit new requests by email and send and receive emails
  related to a request.
- Customize the provided email address assigned to your account. For example,
  `requests.fontara@mail.docusign.net (that is linked to “mailto:requests.fontara@mail.docusign.net”)
  is the email address assigned to you. However, you
  can opt to use a custom version with your own domain.`

There are three levels of settings for external participation:

- **Allow users outside of your account to****receive** **and reply to messages from a****request.**

  This setting is toggled
  ON by default. An account
  user can send a message from the account to users
  not in the account. These external users can receive
  and reply to email messages with all messages
  threading captured in theAgreement Desk activity feed.
- **Allow users outside of your account to
  submit new requests by email.**

  It is turned OFF by
  default. You must also enable Messages must before
  you can turn on this setting. With this setting, any
  external user with the account email address can
  send email to Agreement Desk to
  submit new requests.
- **Allow sending real-time invites to external
  participants from the organization's claimed email
  domains.**

  This is OFF by default.
  When this setting is ON, any
  user who is emailing from your organization's
  claimed domain list receives an automatic email
  invitation to join the Agreement Desk account when they submit a request or reply to a
  message. This occurs even if the user is not in the
  account. See the [Claim a Domain](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=rrf1583359212854&topicId=gso1583359141256.html&_LANG=enus) topic
  for additional information.

For requests submitted by an external user or messages
sent to or from an external user,Agreement Desk
adds a blue External badge.

To configure external participant
email settings:

1. Select Settings > Email.
2. Specify the level of email access for external users in the
   External Participants
   section.
   - Allow users outside of your account to
     receive and reply to messages from a request.
   - Allow users outside of your account to
     submit new requests by email
   - Allow sending real-time invites to external
     participants from the organization's claimed email
     domains.
3. Select Save to save your changes.

title: Enable Agreement Desk for Your Users with One-Click
heading_path: Enable Agreement Desk for Your Users with One-Click
text:
Learn how administrators enable Agreement Desk for users to interact
with and create Agreement Desk requests.

title: Enable Agreement Desk for Your Users with One-Click
heading_path: Enable Agreement Desk for Your Users with One-Click
text:
You must have Docusign administrator (DS Admin) privileges or
Agreement Desk settings manager permissions privileges to turn on
Agreement Desk for your account.

By default, Agreement Desk is turned off. Turn on Agreement Desk to begin using it.

You can turn on Agreement Desk from the Agreements Welcome page with
one click.

1. Select the Agreements tab in the top navigation.
2. Select Requests from the left navigation pane.

   If you are a DS Admin or have Agreement Desk settings
   permissions, the Turn on Agreement Desk  button
   displays.

   ![A screenshot of the Turn onAgreement Desk feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-adm-1-click.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MTIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.P_zPR0ZK-oFG1ztG-3KxD3dXFb9TXxUS2f2EMk9almE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Turn onAgreement Desk feature.")
3. Select Requests from the left navigation.
4. Select Settings.
5. Select Admin.

   The configurable Agreement Desk settings display.
   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk configurable settings.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-adm-set-turn-on.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MTIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.P_zPR0ZK-oFG1ztG-3KxD3dXFb9TXxUS2f2EMk9almE&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk configurable settings.")
6. Select Turn on Agreement Desk.
7. Select Enable Agreement Desk in the
   confirmation dialog
   box
   to enable Agreement Desk

title: Configure Notifications
text:
Learn how to use the Notifications page to select the types of Agreement Desknotifications users receive after they submit a request. Only users in your account can
receive notifications. External users do not receive notifications.

Use the Notifications page to select the types of Agreement Desk
notifications users receive after they submit an Agreement Deskrequest.
Only users in your account can receive notifications. External users do not receive
notifications.

There are two types of notifications in Agreement Desk:

Submitter notifications
:   Account Admins control Submitter notifications. These
    notifications can only be sent to users within the account. There are
    two types of submitter notifications:

    - Confirmation email when a request is submitted
    - Update the email with changes to the submitter, owner, due date,
      title, and status

    Both types are turned on by default. The admin can turn them off at any
    time.

    Note:

    When submitting requests through email, only users within your
    account receive confirmation email. External users do not receive
    this notification.

Follower notifications
:   Any account user with access to a request can select
    Follow in the top-right corner to receive
    email notifications. These provide updates and modifications made to
    that request.

    You can configure Follower notifications for each user as
    described in the [Manage Notification Preferences](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=jux1643235969954&topicId=dhc1578456326388.html&_LANG=enus) topic.

1. From the Docusign Admin page, select
   Admin.
2. Select your Agreement Desk account.

   The Notifications for your account display on the page.![A screenshot of a sample Docusign Notifications entry.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-view-notifications.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MzQsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.KszjuqGAtUFcE2U02rap7m3juHwITRo5CdfMzPKtaho&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Docusign Notifications entry.")

title: Create a New Request Status
text:
Learn how to create new Agreement Desk request types tailored for your
organization's specific needs. Agreement Desk request types are based on Web
Forms.

Create new Agreement Desk request types tailored for your organization's
specific needs. Request types are based on Docusign Web Forms.

1. Select the Statuses tab of the
   Settings page.
2. Select + Add Status.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Add new status dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-adm-new-req-stat.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NTksInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.8qHjeLbp_FOwg66nKORM8Hj2hEqeahnnT-t0y2o9tNQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Add new status dialog box.")
3. Enter a name for the status.
4. In the Status type menu, select whether this status
   should apply to Open or Closed requests.
5. Select an accent color and select Add.

   Note:

   You can make these modifications:

   - Modify the name and accent color for a status by selecting
     Edit.
   - Remove a status by selecting Delete. Deleted
     statuses remain visible under the heading
     Deleted.
6. Use the handle icon on the left side of each status to drag the status to
   re-order.

title: Specify a Default Request Type
text:
Learn how to specify the request type that is automatically applied to requests
submitted by email to the Agreement Desk inbound email
address.

Specify the request type that is automatically applied to requests submmitted by
email to the Agreement Desk inbound email
address.

Sample Request Types

All Agreement Desk accounts come with these four sample
request types. You can use them as is, modify, or delete them.

- New Customer Intake (Default)
- General Legal Request
- NDA Request
- Vendor Contract Request

1. Select Settings from the Requests
   page.

   The Request types tab displays a list of all of
   your request types.
2. Select the overflow (three dot menu) next to the request type that you want to
   use as the default.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk default request type.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-adm-def-req.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MjksInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.Vj6XNR28zSBlP8oDGM1ee9RZLnkDrFFWJ9RlS79dmxU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk default request type.")
3. Select Set as default.

   Note:

   The request type must be active to become the default.

   The new default request type moves to the top of the list with
   (Default) next to it.

title: Duplicate a Request Type
text:
Learn how to use existing request types to save time when you create new request
types.

As an admin, you
may
need to create many request types. You can quickly duplicate
an existing
request
type to change the specifics to fit the new request type.

When you duplicate a request type:

- You duplicate the original request type's name appended by a number, description, and request form.
- the new request type has a draft status.

1. Select Requests in the left navigation to access the
   Request Dashboard.
2. Select Settings.
3. Select the overflow (three dot menu) next to the request type that you want to
   duplicate and select Duplicate.

   ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-new-req-type-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MzEsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.W90pyEW-tG9Ivj1g_Pig7wpWB-x8zSDxBByEQY6wyiM&_LANG=enus)

   - The Duplicating progress messages displays as shown in this example:

     ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-dup-prog-msg.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MzEsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.W90pyEW-tG9Ivj1g_Pig7wpWB-x8zSDxBByEQY6wyiM&_LANG=enus)
   - The new request type displays under the original request
     type with a number appended to it, as shown in this example.

     ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk duplicate request type.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-dup-complete-page.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MzEsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.W90pyEW-tG9Ivj1g_Pig7wpWB-x8zSDxBByEQY6wyiM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk duplicate request type.")
4. Change the request type name and description and select
   Next.
5. Optionally change the required fields for the associated form.
6. When you finish completing the required fields, select
   Activate to make the request public.

   - Users can access the request type when creating and modifying
     requests.
   - The status of the new Request form and type will be
     Draft.

title: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
heading_path: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
text:
You must have Docusign administrator (DS Admin) privileges or
Agreement Desk settings manager permissions privileges for your
account.

This feature simplifies administrative tasks by transferring complex
request type and status settings between different Docusign
instances (such as Demo and Production environments.)

With this feature, administrators can easily package up and move all the
complex rules for request types and their workflow steps (statuses).

For example, you created or changed several request types, and you want to
use these across all the accounts you administer. You can export the information to
a .zip file, and import the settings to other accounts.

title: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
heading_path: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
text:
Export request types and status settings for an
account.

1. Select Agreements  > Requests  > Settings.
2. Select Request types.
3. Select Export from the top menu.

   ![A screenshot of the Docusign Import and Export menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-admin-imp-export.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NzcsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.UH-r_4o4WcOh6J19slhXdPyFUaYSS0WS4gWgt6L7Zm0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign Import and Export menu.")
4. In the Export dialog box, select all or specific request types to export,
   and select Export.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Export request types dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-admin-export-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NzcsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.UH-r_4o4WcOh6J19slhXdPyFUaYSS0WS4gWgt6L7Zm0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Export request types dialog box.")

   Depending on the number of request types you selected, this could take
   several seconds.
5. When the export completes, a file download dialog box displays. Select the
   location for the export zip file.
6. Select Settings > Statuses.
7. Repeat the previous steps to export Status information for your
   account.

title: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
heading_path: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
text:
Import request types and status settings to use for your accounts.

1. Select Agreements  > Requests  > Settings.
2. Select Statuses.
3. Select Import from the top menu.

   ![A screenshot of the Docusign Import and Export menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-admin-imp-export.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NzcsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.UH-r_4o4WcOh6J19slhXdPyFUaYSS0WS4gWgt6L7Zm0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign Import and Export menu.")
4. In the Import dialog box, drag (or select) a request type zip file to the
   Select file area.

   ![A screenshot of the Docusign Import request types dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-admin-import-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NzcsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.UH-r_4o4WcOh6J19slhXdPyFUaYSS0WS4gWgt6L7Zm0&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign Import request types dialog box.")
5. Select Import.

   Depending on the number of request types you selected, this could take
   several seconds.

   When the import successfully completes, the `Import
   completed` message displays.
6. Select Settings > Statuses.
7. Repeat the previous steps to import Status information to your
   account.

title: Use Agreement Desk Reports
text:
Learn how to gain valuable insights into agreement processes and performance. Access reports to understand how many requests are completed, how quickly, and where requests spent the most time.

Gain valuable insights into agreement processes and performance. Access reports to understand how many requests are completed, how quickly, and where requests spent the most time.

See the  [Agreement Manager Request Report Dashboards](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5&topicId=con1fc88284-aff5-46c9-ac08-15db3839fce8.html&_LANG=enus) for detailed information about the request report dashboards.

Note: Reports pull information about closed requests. You can ensure that your reporting is accurate by marking completed requests as closed to ensure they are reflected in the reports.

**Agreement Desk request data in Docusign Reports**

The Request Reports in the Docusign Reports tab now has enhanced functionality that lets you apply filters, view reports, and download data.

In addition to the pipeline chart, Docusign Reporting provides deep insights into your overall requests. For more information, see the article.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select the Reports insights icon (![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Request page Report Insights icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-insights-icon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MzYsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.k3TQVdH6g8bzeFaZMmuFCAaXJslrjV5Fg1_pnz1hSpA&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Request page Report Insights icon.")) to display the Insights dialog box, as shown in this example.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement DeskRequest Insights request status report.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ad-newest-request-insite-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MzYsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.k3TQVdH6g8bzeFaZMmuFCAaXJslrjV5Fg1_pnz1hSpA&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement DeskRequest Insights request status report.")

   The Insight display shows a visual representation color-coded by request statuses types. Details include:

   - Number of each status type
   - Percentage of each status type
   - Detailed information about a status type when you hover your cursor over a specific graph bar
3. Select Go to Reports to view reports dashboards.

   The Requests Insights page displays, as shown in this example.

title: Delete a Custom Status
text:
Learn how to delete a custom status that you created when you no longer need it.

You can delete a custom status that you created when you no longer need it.

1. Select Requests in the left navigation.
2. Select Settings > Statuses.
3. Select the trash can to the right of the status you want to delete.

   ![A screenshot showing how to delete a Agreement Desk custom status.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5/page/images/ac-del-status.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1NjYsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZjBjYTkxNjctMzgyNS00YjM2LWEzODUtZTk4MzIxZjdhZGI1In0.Js3kX_p7S8g_Ej2tqC3L6NYV0dpNj-IeQosg7C76miM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing how to delete a Agreement Desk custom status.")

   The Delete status? dialog box opens prompting you to confirm the
   action.
4. Select Yes, delete.

The custom status is no longer visible in the list of statuses.

Note: If you applied a deleted status to an active request, the
request keeps that deleted status until changed by a person with access. The deleted
status can no longer be applied to other requests.

For example, a request has the
legal review status, and someone deletes
legal review as a status. Any active requests that
have legal review as a selected status continue to show
legal reviewas a status even though that status was
deleted.

title: Manage Agreement Desk Request Documents
text:
Read about the actions that you can take to manage documents within Agreement Desk.

Agreements and documents are central to most of agreements. Docusign
Agreement Desk provides you with many tools for viewing, managing,
collaborating, and editing drafts of these documents.

- **Preview**: View documents in Agreement Desk by using the Docusign Document Viewer.
- **Download**: Retrieve documents directly from
  Agreement Desk to review as Word
  or PDF files.
- **Edit in Word**: Edit documents using
  Microsoft Word.
- **Rename**: Rename the document.
- **Delete**: Delete the document.
- **Version history**: Track versions of a
  document as changes are made by both the first and
  third-party stakeholders.
- **Upload new version**: Upload a different version of the
  current document.
- **Send for Signature**: Send documents for signature through Docusign eSignature. The status is shown directly in the request.
- **Convert a PDF file to a Word document**: Convert a PDF file to a Microsoft Word
  document in an Agreement Desk request.
- **Compare Documents**: Quickly view a comparison between two .docx documents from any
  Agreement Desk request.

title: Assign an Owner to a Request
heading_path: Assign an Owner to a Request
text:
Learn how to assign an owner to a Agreement Desk request. The owner is
responsible for incoming requests and must be aware of changes and updates.

The owner is responsible for the activities related to the Agreement Desk
request. By default the owner becomes a follower of the request and receives
notifications about changes and updates.

1. Select Requests from the left
   navigation.

   The Requests dashboard
   opens.
2. Locate the request that you want to edit.

   You can sort and filter requests to find the one you want. For more information, see the topic
   [Search and Filter Requests](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=yrc1740515145178.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to search Agreement Desk requests, filter, and sort requests to locate the ones you need.").
3. Select the request to open it.

   The request's Overview page displays.
4. Select the pencil icon in the Information section to
   dipslay the Edit request information dialog box.

   ![A screenshot of the Edit request information dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-req-edit-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNTIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.nV4xaFmp7VWpGxpFlmI9BDY2OmSxG4ZV0KOYkvn5Yew&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Edit request information dialog box.")
5. Start entering a name in the Owner field and select from
   the list of names that are displayed as you type.

   If an owner is already assigned, select the X next to
   the name to delete the owner and make the Owner field
   active.
6. Select Save.

The Request information box reflects the name that you selected as the owner.

title: Reply to Messages in Requests
text:
Learn how to reply to Agreement Desk request messages within an email
message thread within requests and optionally attach documents.

You can easily respond to an an Agreement Desk request message within the
message thread of a request and attach documents, if necessary.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select a request to open it.

   The Request details Overview page
   displays.
3. Select All Activity > Messages Only to view messages exchanged within the request.
4. View the email message thread for a request.
5. Locate the message that you want to reply to and select Reply or Reply all.

   The Reply Message dialog box displays.
6. Select a name in the To field, enter a message, and optionally attach a document.

   ![A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk request reply to a message feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-reply-msg.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NDMsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.fkFh0wdhlxP6aBLxpVFxpsDk91RVbzG8zUmd97c89O8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk request reply to a message feature.")
7. Select Send.

The Activity Feed reflects your reply to a message in the message thread.

title: Agreement Desk Request Reports Dashboards
text:
To effectively analyze your team's efficiency, it helps to understand how the chart
processes different stages of a ticket's lifecycle.

- **Custom Statuses:** Workspace administrators can define tailored stages
  to match your team's workflow. For example, Legal
  Review, Ready for Review,
  On Hold, or Ready for
  Signature.
- **Chart Logic:** This chart only displays data for
  Closed requests. It retroactively calculates the
  exact number of days a completed request spent in each of its previous
  **Open** custom statuses. Active or open requests are excluded from
  this chart.

title: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
heading_path: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
text:
Learn how to access and approve Agreement Desk requests through Docusign Unified Tasks.

You can access and approve Agreement Desk requests through Docusign
Unified Tasks.

title: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
heading_path: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
text:
Docusign Unified Tasks is a single, centralized hub
within the Docusign system that provides visibility to all tasks
assigned to you that require your action.

With Unified Tasks Management, you can access one central view to manage
tasks across your Docusign applications. This process helps you
handle tasks efficiently and prioritize your work. Effective task management can
also help you get agreements signed more efficiently.

Agreement Desk syncs request-based approvals with the Docusign Unified Tasks ecosystem, providing a one-stop shop for
task management.

In addition to using Agreement Desk, you can view, track, and directly
manage Agreement Desk approvals assigned to you in Unified Task
Management.

For detailed information, see the Find assigned Agreement Desk requests
section in the  [IAM Unified Search](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=conbd35fa9c-4ddb-4f01-be91-f55928fac98a.html&_LANG=enus)

title: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
heading_path: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
Identify an Agreement Desk request approval task in Unified Tasks
text:
In the Unified Tasks dashboard, the Agreement Desk request
approvals have these format components:

Task type
:   Look for Agreement Desk request approval

Approval Name
:   **Approval**
    **Name** : The task name clearly identifies the request and the
    specific approval needed in this format:

    `Request Title-Approval Title`

    Example: New NDA Request - Finance Approval

See the  [Perform a Task from the Docusign Unified Task View](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=ikc1746801059132&topicId=spq1746807934085.html&_LANG=enus) article for
information about managing tasks in Unified Tasks.

Approvals created in Agreement Desk that are assigned to individuals show
in IAM Unified Tasks as well as in Agreement Desk.

Note: Approvals assigned to a group show in Agreement Desk, but do not show in Unified Tasks.

title: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
heading_path: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
text:
The
Request
Approval tasks are automatically removed from the Unified Tasks list once you
approve or reject the approval in Agreement Desk.

Here are the actions that you can take.

- **Single Assignee** or **Any One Approval**: The task is immediately
  removed from the Unified Tasks list after you select **Approve** or
  **Reject**.
- **Require all to approve** is on: The task remains visible until every
  required user has selected **Approve** or **Reject**.
- **Task Reset:** If an approval is reset in Agreement Desk, the Approve task
  re-displays in Unified Tasks. This requires new action.
- **Deletion:** If the Approval or the Request is deleted in Agreement Desk, the
  task is immediately removed from Unified Tasks for all
  assignees.

title: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
heading_path: Request Approvals in IAM Unified Tasks
Take Action on Agreement Desk Approvals
text:
There are two ways to access the Approve or Reject details.

From the Unified Task list
:   Click the **Approve** task bar in the main Unified Tasks list to navigate directly to the
    **Approvals tab** of the relevant Request in Agreement Desk. The is the fastest way to the action screen.

Agreement Desk requests page
:   See the topic [Manage Request
    Approvals](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=cqt1740782949607.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to Agreement Desk approve, reject, or change an approval.") for information about adding approvals from the
    requests page.

title: Comments in Request Documents
text:
Learn about the Agreement Desk commenting features that let users discuss specific terms, request input from internal stakeholders, and optionally create approvals directly from a comment.

Use Comments in request documents to highlight text to start a discussion,
instantly pulling in collaborators who get immediate access directly in the thread.

This feature centralizes internal discussions directly in the draft to eliminate messy email chains and ensure total stakeholder alignment all in one place.

With Agreement Desk request comments, you can:

- Use comments on documents to highlight text to start a discussion,
  instantly pulling in collaborators who get immediate access directly in the
  thread.
- Use the enhanced comments sidebar to:

  - Always access document comments from the sidebar, even when no
    comments exist yet.
  - Quickly filter comments to focus on open items or resolved
    threads.
  - See timestamps that show when each comment was added or
    updated.
  - Reply to, resolve, and reopen comments directly from the
    sidebar without scrolling through the document.
  - Share direct links to specific comments so collaborators can
    jump straight to the exact place in the document.
- Manage comments: Add, edit, delete, respond to, and resolve to comments in an Agreement Desk request document.

title: Comments in Request Documents
text:
Here are some sample use case for Comments in documents.

Legal
:   Turn complex negotiations into quick resolutions by using @mention for stakeholders directly on the relevant clause.

Sales and Procurement
:   Provide the sales teams with instant, in-context negotiation boundaries by flagging difficult terms.

title: Comments in Request Documents
heading_path: How comments in request documents work
text:
Mentions and permissions
:   - Using @mention for a user who does not already have access to the request,immediately adds that user to the permissions list.
    - Users who are @mentioned receive an email notification with basic request and comment details, and an in-document link to the comment.

title: Use Custom Request Identifiers
text:
Learn about custom Agreement Desk request identifiers that help you improve
discoverability, simplify customer communication, and improve overall request
tracking.

Request identifiers help you better organize and search for requests in Agreement Desk. This enhances discoverability, simplifies customer
communication, and improves overall request tracking.

title: Use Custom Request Identifiers
text:
As an Admin, you can customize the request prefix (REQ). Agreement Desk automatically provides the numbers starting at 0001 going
upward for each newly created request.

- Default Identifier: REQ-xxxx
  - Prefix: REQ

    Letters A-Z
  - Number: #### ( This cannot be changed.)

Example: REQ-0603

title: Use Custom Request Identifiers
text:
Account Admins can optionally configure a meaningful identifier prefix to
replace the default REQ.

To ensure system compatibility and clarity, follow these request identifier
format guidelines.

- Prefix name
  - **Length**: Must be from **0 and 5** letters
    long
  - **Acceptable Characters**: Only the letters **A through
    Z** (uppercase or lowercase)
  - **Unacceptable Characters**: Symbols, special
    characters, or numbers
- Numbering

  Agreement Desk automatically provide the
  sequential numbering suffix, starting at 0001.

title: Use Contract Agents to Complete Requests in Agreement Desk
heading_path: Use Contract Agents to Complete Requests in Agreement Desk
text:
Read about how AI Agreement Desk Agents in Agreement Desk automate time-intensive tasks within Agreement Desk, improving efficiency and reducing manual effort for users.

Note: The AI agents must be enabled by an administrator for you to use
this feature.

AI Contract Agents are specialized assistants that operate behind the scenes to automate
time-intensive tasks within Agreement Desk, improving efficiency and reducing manual
effort for users.

Agreement Desk AI Contract Agents work in these Agreement Desk
tasks.

AI Contract Agents help with the following:

- Intake: Understands the context of requests and intelligently pulls relevant details
  from emails and attachments. The extracted details are used to populate forms with
  highly accurate and meaningful information.
- Message Drafting (Beta): Quickly converts a request status or a markup summary to an
  email that you can send to stakeholders.

Important: Make sure you review the agents' results for
accuracy and suitability for your request.

title: Use Contract Agents to Complete Requests in Agreement Desk
heading_path: Use Contract Agents to Complete Requests in Agreement Desk
text:
Contract agents read and understand emails and attachments.

1. When a user sends an email to the Agreement Desk intake
   email address, the intake agent automatically analyzes the content of the
   email and attachments.
2. Agreement Desk sends an email to the submitter with a
   link to begin the intake process.
3. When the user begins the intake process, the intake agent suggests
   an intake form based on the context of the user's email and attachments.
4. The user evaluates the request type recommendation to confirm that
   it is appropriate and accepts or changes it.
5. Agreement Desk extracts key information from the
   original email request and any attachments. The agent then pre-fills
   relevant fields in the form with the extracted information.
6. The user reviews the form and, if necessary, completes fields that
   are not completed and submits the completed request.

title: Compare Docusign Agreement Desk and Docusign Workspaces
heading_path: Compare Docusign Agreement Desk and Docusign Workspaces
text:
Learn about the features of Docusign Agreement Desk and Docusign Workspaces.

Docusign provides two features for agreement and task
workflows.

Workspaces is a secure, collaborative, customer-facing hub that consolidates
all agreements and tasks related to a specific transaction. Workspaces streamline
multi-step agreement processes and enhances the customer experience by reducing
frustration and abandonment.

Agreement Desk, in contrast, is intended for internal business use.
You can manage the process of creating, preparing, and getting agreements from request
to signature, focusing on internal workflows rather than customer interactions.

Integration between Workspaces and Agreement Desk is planned for the future but
is not currently available.

title: Compare Docusign Agreement Desk and Docusign Workspaces
heading_path: Compare Docusign Agreement Desk and Docusign Workspaces
text:
Workspaces centralizes people, agreements, and information in one place. This
function provides up-to-the-minute collaboration, role-based permissions, and
built-in authentication to accelerate transactions and improve organization.

For detailed information, see the [Docusign Workspaces](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=bmb1723842049882&topicId=ovf1725900699633.html&_LANG=enus) article.

**Use Case Examples**

- A customer opens a new investment account. Workspaces provides a
  streamlined and secure experience for external participants.
- A healthcare administrator opens a surgical procedure
  authorization.

For additional use cases, see the [Docusign Workspace Use Case Guide](https://dsucustomers.docusign.com/km-guide-docusign-workspaces-use-case-guide/2413946).

title: Compare Docusign Agreement Desk and Docusign Workspaces
heading_path: Compare Docusign Agreement Desk and Docusign Workspaces
text:
Agreement Desk handles the stages for agreement creation and
preparation, while Workspaces focuses on the commit and execution stages. Agreement Desk provides a streamlined experience for external
participants such as customers.

For detailed information, see the [Welcome to Docusign
Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=oan1736279133237.html&_LANG=enus) article.

**Use Case Examples**

- A marketing employee submits a request to create a new vendor
  agreement.
- A Human Resources employee sends an offer letter to a prospective
  employee.

For additional use cases, see the [Docusign Agreement Desk Use Case
Guide](https://dsucustomers.docusign.com/km-guide-agreement-desk-use-case-examples/2298236).

title: Get Started with Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to get started with Docusign
Agreement Desk by creating and assigning your first request.

This quick introduction to Agreement Desk describes how to create a
request, add a document, and send it for approval and signature. It also describes
how to see your activity flow in the Activity Feed.

1. Select Agreements in the top navigation.
2. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   If you have no requests, the Requests dashboard displays a Create
   Request option along with a Learn
   More link to tutorial videos.

   ![A screenshot of theAgreement Desk Request page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-new-empty-req-pg.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzMjcsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.tPuwFLWL8BppD2DQFzV_hzUTex6F9BQySEBBX3LWn6I&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of theAgreement Desk Request page.")

   If you have Agreement Desk requests, the
   Requests dashboard displays, showing a list of
   requests with relevant information, such as, title created date and time,
   last activity date and time, status, submitter, and owner.
3. Select Create Request.

   Note: You can also create a request directly from your
   inbox. Send an email to the Agreement Desk email alias for your
   organization. See the [Create a Request through Email](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=umt1747683535119.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create anAgreement Deskrequest directly from your email.") article.

   1. Select a form from the list of request types.
   2. Complete the fields in the form.
   3. Select Submit.

   A confirmation dialog box displays.
4. Select View Request to see details about the request you created.
5. Set the status, assign a due date, and assign any owner.
   1. In the Request Information section to the right,
      select the pencil icon to edit the request.
   2. Select a status from the Status menu.
   3. Select a date from the Due Date field.
   4. Select an Owner field.
   5. Select Save.
6. Edit information in the request intake form.
   1. Select the Details tab.
   2. (Optional) Select Edit to change information in
      the form. After making your changes, select
      Submit.
7. Add a document to your request.
   1. Select the Documents tab.
   2. Select Add Documents.
   3. Choose the method for adding the document. Either upload a document or generate a document.

   The document you added is displayed in the list of documents.
8. Send a message. You may want to send the message to yourself so you can test it out.
   1. Select the Overview tab.
   2. Select Send Message.
   3. Add your email address and a message and select Send.

   In a few seconds, you'll see the message that you sent in the activity feed.
9. Send your request for approval. Select an approver from the Contact
   list.
   1. Select the Approvals tab.
   2. Select Add Approval.
   3. Enter a title, description, and approvers. Select Send
      Approval.

   The approval displays on the Approvals page with
   a status of Waiting for approval. To approve the request,
   select Decide and
   Approve.
10. Send your document for signature.
    1. Select the Envelopes tab.
    2. Select Send for signature.
    3. Select the documents that you want to send, and select Send for signature.
    4. Complete the signing process as normal.

title: How Does Agreement Desk Work?
text:
Learn about how Agreement Desk works by reviewing a sample workflow that
demonstrates Agreement Desk features.

Agreement Desk is a centralized workspace designed to
simplify and accelerate the pre-signature phase of the agreement lifecycle. It
provides a single location for all your agreement work.

You can create new requests:

Directly in Agreement Desk
:   Start a new request directly within the platform's intuitive interface.

Submit through email
:   Email your request to a designated address, and Agreement Desk automatically
    transforms the email into a traceable task on your dashboard.

Once you create a request, you have a centralized hub for all subsequent actions.

- Easily collaborate on documents with your team
- Highlight and negotiate terms
- Send and receive approvals from various stakeholders
- Send the final document for signature

title: How Does Agreement Desk Work?
text:
This scenario demonstrates how Agreement Desk works with
Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) features to complete an agreement
workflow.

This scenario follows an Account Executive (AE) as they work with their Legal team to
finalize a new client contract.

Request intake
:   An AE sends an email to Agreement Desk to request a new
    client contract. With the power of AI agents, Agreement Desk suggests what request type to select. It also helps complete the intake
    form based on information from the email and any attachments and
    documents.

Automated workflow
:   When the AE submits the web form, it kicks off a workflow. This
    workflow will automatically:

    - Change the request status to Legal Review
    - Add the Sales Director as a follower for visibility
    - Generate a draft contract document using Agreement Preparation and
      Document templates
    - Send the request for Approval to Legal and Finance

Collaboration and negotiation
:   The legal team is automatically notified of the new request.

    - An attorney reviews the document and uses in-app messages to email
      the revised contract to the client for their review
    - The client replies with their own changes and the changes are
      automatically captured in the request

Approvals and edits
:   An approval is sent to the finance team to get an extra discount approved.
    They use the Word Add-in to make final edits to the document before it’s
    ready.

Signature
:   The document is now ready for signature using Docusign eSignature.

Storage
:   Once signed, the final agreement is automatically stored in Docusign Agreement Manager, where key details are
    extracted for easy searching and reporting.

For more use case examples, see the [Docusign Agreement Desk
Use Case Guide.](https://dsucustomers.docusign.com/path/docusign-agreement-desk/km-guide-agreement-desk-use-case-examples/2298236)

title: Manage the Request Status
text:
Read about how users indicate the state of a request by setting the status.

To make it easy for stakeholders to track the status of requests, the requests dashboard
reflects the current state of a request with a status. The request owner can change the
status to reflect the current state, and admins can create custom status labels tailored
to their organization's need.

To ensure accurate reporting, it's a good practice to mark the status of completed
requests as Closed, to ensure accurate reporting. Agreement Desk
reports include only closed requests. So closed requests that have a status of Open are
not reflected in the reports.The status for requests is visible in the dashboard.

title: Manage the Request Status
text:
All Agreement Desk accounts include these statuses a that can be
modified at any time:

- Business Review
- Closed
- In-progress
- Legal Reviews
- New
- Waiting for Signature

Request owners can set the status from the Information area on the
Overview tab in a request. See the [Reorder Statuses](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5&topicId=ibv1746742497759.html&_LANG=enus) the article for more information.

title: Manage the Request Status
text:
If your
organization requires a wider range of or more specific status options, an
administrator can create custom statuses, with custom colors, to fit the
organization's needs. See the topic Edit a Custom Status. [Create a Custom Status for Requests](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5&topicId=mkt1746739630705.html&_LANG=enus).

title: Replace a Document with a Newer Version
heading_path: Replace a Document with a Newer Version
text:
Learn how to replace an existing document associated with a request with a newer version.

You can replace an existing document in an Agreement Desk request by uploading a
newer version. The version history is maintained.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the overflow menu (the three dot menu) next to the document that you
   want to replace.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request document actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-sel-doc-action.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNzgsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.bW8yQCPnfpSBnwJc8ru0wT9y9CQFvYICPwU9P6kNCaQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request document actions menu.")
4. Select Upload new version.
5. Select the new version of the document that you want to upload and select Open.

The new version of the document replaces the old version in the list of documents on the Documents tab. You can also see the changes to the document by selecting Version history from the overflow menu.

title: Delete Documents from Agreement Desk Requests
heading_path: Delete Documents from Agreement Desk Requests
text:
Learn how to delete documents associated with Agreement Desk requests when they are no longer needed.

When documents associated with Agreement Desk requests are no longer needed, you can delete them from a request.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Open the request that contains the document that you want to delete.
3. Select the Documents tab.

   A list of documents associated with the request displays.
4. Select the overflow menu (the three dot menu) next to the document that you
   want to delete.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request document actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-sel-doc-action.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzODMsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.2q_KwcybF4dOEcQStMyKZGHPQeiUBFIfPWhXqDj_OwI&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request document actions menu.")
5. Select Delete.

   A confirmation dialog box displays asking you to confirm that you want to delete the document.
6. Select Confirm.

The document you deleted is no longer listed on the Documents page.

title: Manage Account Requests
text:
Read about how users and administrators view Agreement Desk requests and
relevant information about them, as well as search and filter to find specific
requests.

Access the Agreement Desk
Agreements page by selecting Requests from
the left navigation area.

![A screenshot of theAgreement Desk Requests option on the Agreements page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-access.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzMzAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.GoBNzt4UzfH6v42l14jCZUm44nsaM8W8p7NZvhg8OyQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of theAgreement Desk Requests option on the Agreements page.")

Note: You can also access Agreement Desk requests from
your account home page.

![A screenshot of accessing Agreement Desk Requests option from the Docusign account home page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-sel-req-home-pg.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzMzAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.GoBNzt4UzfH6v42l14jCZUm44nsaM8W8p7NZvhg8OyQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of accessing Agreement Desk Requests option from the Docusign account home page.")

The Requests dashboard displays. The dashboard is a central hub for all requests for an
account. And from here, you can open and work with requests.

![A screenshot of the Requests page navigation menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-newest-req-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzMzAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.GoBNzt4UzfH6v42l14jCZUm44nsaM8W8p7NZvhg8OyQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Requests page navigation menu.")

The dashboard give you a snapshot of requests and key information, including:

- **Title**: Enter text in the Title field.

  You
  can enter a text-only title of your choice. This title becomes the request's
  official title in Agreement Desk and throughout
  IAM.
- **Created at**: The date and time the request was created.
- **Due Date**: The targeted date for the request completion
- - **Last activity at**: The date and time of the latest action
    taken with the request.
- **Owner**: The owner of a request is assigned by the request creator.
- **Submitter**: The user who created the request. It may or may not be the
  current owner.
- **Request type**:The type of request, such as NDA or MSA.
- **Status** : A descriptive status of the request state:
  - Blocked
  - Business
  - HR Review
  - In Progress
  - Legal Review
  - Legal Review - Pending
  - Needs Work
  - New
  - Pending Approval
  - Ready for Signature
  - Waiting for Signature
- **Status type**: Indicates whether the request status is opened or closed. By
  default, only open requests display on the dashboard. You can use the search
  filters to display both open and closed or only closed requests.

By default, only open requests are displayed in the dashboard.

Here is an example of request types.

![A screenshot of sample Agreement Desk request types.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-newest-req-type.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzMzAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.GoBNzt4UzfH6v42l14jCZUm44nsaM8W8p7NZvhg8OyQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of sample Agreement Desk request types.")

Note: Agreement Desk reports include only closed requests. To ensure
accurate reporting, it's a good practice to mark completed requests as
Closed. Closed requests marked as Open are not reflected in
the reports and will skew your results.

title: Delete Requests
text:
Learn how to delete a request that you no longer need.

Delete an Agreement Deskrequest when you no longer need it.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation.
2. Select a request to open it.

   The Overview page displays.
3. Select Details.
4. Select Delete Request in the right lower area of the window.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Delete Request feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-delete-req.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNDAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.-P7PV1WGad8YugMoINm-nSXVitTkZpRRNYmtCTwpUHo&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Delete Request feature.")

   A confirmation dialog box displays.
5. Select Delete.

The Requests dashboard displays and the request that you deleted is removed from the list.

title: Welcome to Agreement Desk
text:
Read about Docusign Agreement Desk and how it can help accelerate your agreement lifecycle from initial request to final signature.

Note: Agreement Desk is offered to U.S. Docusign IAM customers on select plans. Contact your account team for
more information. To learn more, see the [Get from
request to signature faster](https://www.docusign.com/products/agreement-desk) article.

Agreement Desk is a collaborative hub to streamlines intake,
accelerates review, and centralizes approvals. With Agreement Desk,
agreements move from request to signature faster.

title: Welcome to Agreement Desk
text:
Here are some features and information you can use with Agreement Desk.

- [Agreement Desk Implementation Guide](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=map411fc0f3-eab8-467a-bd9c-65fd32b378c5&topicId=conb5903479-4c99-451c-9e36-af2953e43a45.html&_LANG=enus) Provides a central road map, providing a structured path from initial setup to full-scale team adoption.
- [AI-Assisted Review](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=confef1b68e-4d95-443d-a51c-7b04377874b9.html&_LANG=enus): Use
  this add-in for Microsoft Word for contract clause corrections, suggestions, and
  markup. The add-in uses AI to generate, substitute, explain, and add contract
  language for reviewers and stakeholders.
- [Building a Workflow Builder Workflow for Agreement Desk﻿](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=map4317ef56-de36-43e2-9921-c76a445c3276&topicId=conc8be3113-737a-46b3-a964-d5ca357b03b4.html&_LANG=enus)﻿: Construct a workflow designed to automate Agreement Desk requests.
- [Document Templates](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=map332c3ebc-8fca-4fac-9b9f-c7206adc3985&topicId=conc8f06624-6ef6-40a3-bbc8-c5c7fe18746b.html&_LANG=enus)  Use Document templates in Docusignagreement preparation to ensure reuse across envelopes, using placeholder fields for efficient, customized agreements that merge standard language with auto-filled details.
- [Docusign Agreement Preparation](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=als1679428547895&topicId=con69f37310-893b-4c6e-b9f9-41695d325749.html&_LANG=enus): Use Agreement Preparation to generate customized documents where traditional field data is embedded seamlessly into the agreement.
- [Docusign Agreement Desk Release Notes](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=map0d6a36b2-1d47-4d83-b448-2969e5748ab6&topicId=rsw1740519697083.html&_LANG=enus): Agreement Desk new features, announcements, and fixes.

title: Manage Agreement Communications
text:
Learn how Agreement Desk messages work and how you can interact with
messages that are related to requests.

The Agreement Desk Messaging feature provides the ability to receive
and reply to messages.

Messaging in a request works just like the email that you use in your everyday life. You
can send a message, reply to a message, and forward a message. Recipients see the
message in their email inbox and can reply. The replies are captured in the request.

You can view the messages associated with a request. Refer to the Activity
Feed section of the Overview page.

![A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk request Send Message feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-send-msg-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MzAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.BUvpSFGYzJ1xj79e63nisIm-rnRi88FnL7XIzZvXCgU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk request Send Message feature.")

title: Request Creation Methods
text:
Read about the ways that you can create a request.

You can create a request from your email or from the Requests dashboard.

- Dashboard request: Create a request from the dashboard by
  selecting a specific request type from the Requests
  dashboard. For more information, see the topic [Create a Request from the Requests Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=tpa1740514877858.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create a specific request type from the Agreement Desk Requests dashboard.").
- Email request: Create a request by sending an email to your
  organization's Agreement Desk email address. Use the provided default address or a
  customized address. You can attach documents to the email to include them in the
  task.
  - When you submit by email, the default request type is applied.
  - For more information, see the topic [Create a Request through Email](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=umt1747683535119.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create anAgreement Deskrequest directly from your email.").

title: View Requests Updates on the Activity Feed
heading_path: View Requests Updates on the Activity Feed
text:
Learn how to view the activity associated with Agreement Desk requests,
such as status changes, document uploads through the Activity
Feed.

View activity associated with requests, such as messages, status changes, and document uploads, through the Activity Feed.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation.
2. Select a request to open it.
3. Select Activity Feed on the
   Overview tab.

   ![A screenshot showing sample Agreement Desk request activity.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-req-activity-feed.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNDQsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.-7mjdwtc7o08XkkvYal4foqq4ReCdvrplQGivBagX68&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing sample Agreement Desk request activity.")
4. (Optional) View only the messages in the feed by selecting Messages only from the All activity menu.

title: Get a Direct link to a Comment
heading_path: Get a Direct link to a Comment
text:
1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
4. Select Preview from the vertical three-dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.
5. Select the comments icon to open the comments sidebar
6. At the top of the comments list, select the filter control.
7. Select Get link to this comment  option, as shown in the
   following example.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Comments menu Get link to this comment option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/adesk-req-comm-get-link.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjMsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.ZQWdF7gSyKkGJY9tunurPsDK0gf7KDK1R0myHHLja0s&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Comments menu Get link to this comment option.")

   A confirmation message displays in the bottom left of the page confirming that Agreement Desk
   copies the link to your clipboard.

   ![A screenshot of the Comments Menu Get Link confirmation message.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-clause-link-confirm.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjMsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.ZQWdF7gSyKkGJY9tunurPsDK0gf7KDK1R0myHHLja0s&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Comments Menu Get Link confirmation message.")
8. Paste the link into an email, chat, or other message so that collaborators can
   open the document and jump directly to that comment.

   Note:

   People who open a direct comment link must have appropriate
   access to the Agreement Desk request and document to view
   the comment.

title: Reply to and Resolve Comments from the Sidebar
heading_path: Reply to and Resolve Comments from the Sidebar
text:
Learn how to use the Agreement Desk comments sidebar to directly respond to
and resolve from the comments sidebar.

You can use the Agreement Desk comments sidebar to directly respond to
and resolve from the comments sidebar.

1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
4. Select Preview from the vertical three dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.
5. Select the comments icon to open the comments sidebar.
6. In the comments list, select the comment you want to act on.
7. Reply to a comment:
   1. Select the reply field below the comment.
   2. Enter your response.
   3. If needed, use @mention to notify another user.
   4. Select Send to add your reply to the
      thread.
8. Resolve a comment:
   1. Select Resolve from the comment's overflow
      menu.
   2. Enter your response.
   3. If needed, use @mention to notify another user.
   4. Select Send to add your reply to the
      thread.
9. Reopen a resolved comment:
   1. Change the filter to only show resolved comments.
   2. Open the comment and select Reopen.
   3. Select Save.

      Tip:

      Use replies for ongoing discussion and
      Resolve when an issue or question in
      the comment has been addressed.

title: View Comment Timestamps in the Sidebar
heading_path: View Comment Timestamps in the Sidebar
text:
Learn how to use the Agreement Desk comments sidebar to view timestamps.
These indicate when a comment was added or updated.

1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
4. Select Preview from the vertical three dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.
5. Select the comments icon to open the comments sidebar
6. Under or next to the commenter’s name, find the timestamp for the comment, as
   shown in this example:

   ![A screenshot showing a sample of a timestamp in the Agreement Desk comments sidebar.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/adesk-req-comm-time-stamp.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MTgsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.MLygYya1PgL8atSUFNHiH9XKVJilcgcw3F6jVUQCa_8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing a sample of a timestamp in the Agreement Desk comments sidebar.")
7. Review the timestamp to understand when the comment was created or last
   updated.

   Note:

   Timestamps typically use your local time zone or your Agreement Desk user time zone settings.

title: Filter Comments in the Sidebar
text:
Learn how to determine which comments display in theAgreement Desk request comments sidebar.

You can determine which comments display in theAgreement Desk request comments sidebar.

1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
4. Select Preview from the vertical three-dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.
5. Select the comments icon to open the comments sidebar.
6. Select the type of comments you want to see and select
   Reply.

   Filter by all, open, or resolved comments.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk document comments filter dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/adesk-req-comm-add-filter.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MTIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.u_ikgTRmM9c0hzB0ywSuMRtQJcX6xhoFGjTvUxFRrSw&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk document comments filter dialog box.")

   Note:

   Available filter options can vary based on how your organization
   configures Agreement Desk.

title: Work with Document Comments in the Comments Sidebar
heading_path: Work with Document Comments in the Comments Sidebar
text:
Learn how to use the comments sidebar in Agreement Desk request documents to
review, filter, and act on comments without leaving the document view.

Use the comments sidebar in Agreement Desk request documents to
review, filter, and act on comments without leaving the document view.

Use the comments sidebar to:

- Always access document comments from the sidebar, even when no
  comments exist yet.
- Quickly filter comments to focus on open items or resolved
  threads.
- See timestamps that show when each comment was added or
  updated.
- Reply to, resolve, and reopen comments directly from the sidebar
  without scrolling through the document.
- Share direct links to specific comments so collaborators can jump
  straight to the exact place in the document.

![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk request document Comments side bar.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/adesk-req-comm-add-com-side.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MDksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.j7MSo-JfEJMtaenVIROEePZ1S5zv-X1fbR0-5eS24JM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk request document Comments side bar.")

1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
