4. Select Preview from the vertical three-dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.
5. Select the comments icon to open the comments sidebar as shown in the following
   example:

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Deskrequest document Comments icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/adesk-req-comm-icon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MDksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.j7MSo-JfEJMtaenVIROEePZ1S5zv-X1fbR0-5eS24JM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Deskrequest document Comments icon.")
6. Review the comments list.

   - If the document has comments, the sidebar lists them.
   - If no one has added comments yet, the sidebar shows the
     message No comments yet as shown in this example

   ![A screenshot of a sample Comments sidebar with no comments.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/adesk-req-comm-none.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MDksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.j7MSo-JfEJMtaenVIROEePZ1S5zv-X1fbR0-5eS24JM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Comments sidebar with no comments.")

   Tip:

   The comments icon and sidebar stay available while you work in
   the document so that you can open or close the panel at any time.

title: Create a Request from the Requests Dashboard
heading_path: Create a Request from the Requests Dashboard
text:
Learn how to create a specific request type from the Agreement Desk
Requests dashboard.

Create a specific type of request directly from the Agreement Desk
Requests dashboard.

1. Select the Agreements tab in the top navigation.
2. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
3. Select Create Request.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Requests dashboard Create Request feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-create-sel.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNTksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.gTlspYAQG_Q6hBPyIeC3uRuNvOuFVvga1oub_zws-M4&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Requests dashboard Create Request feature.")

   The What type of request is this?
   page opens with a list of request types to choose
   from.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Create a request dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-create-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNTksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.gTlspYAQG_Q6hBPyIeC3uRuNvOuFVvga1oub_zws-M4&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Create a request dialog box.")
4. Select the type of request that you want to create.
5. Complete the form and select Next.
6. Optionally
   create
   your own title.

   Enter a text-only title to serve as the request's
   official designation within Agreement Desk and throughout IAM.

   A summary of your request displays.
7. Review the summary and edit the information if necessary and select Submit.

A confirmation page displays with the option to view the request or select Done.

title: Create a Request from the Requests Dashboard
heading_path: Create a Request from the Requests Dashboard
text: Select View request to open the request and work with it. Select Done to return to the Requests dashboard.

title: Compare Documents in Requests
text:
Learn how to compare Agreement Desk request documents to view the latest
version of a document and immediately compare it to a different version.

Use the Agreement Desk Document Compare feature to quickly view a comparison
between two documents from any Agreement Desk request.

You can compare:

- .docx files
- PDF files

Note: The PDF files are automatically converted to .docx
files during the comparison.

1. Select Requests from the
   Agreements page.

   The Requests dashboard opens.
2. Open the request that you want.
3. Select the Documents tab.
4. For the document you want to compare, select the vertical three-dot menu and
   select Compare.

   The Compare documents dialog box
   displays.
5. In the Compare with  menu, select the document and the
   document version you want to use for the comparison.
6. Select Compare to begin the comparison.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Compare Documents dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-newst-compare-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MDAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.cLpkbyuoDdquODNzVoWLEHTkKuWGqQww67fSjJXgwWg&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Compare Documents dialog box.")
7. When the comparison completes, the right pane shows a preview of the document
   comparisons, including additions and deletions.

   ![A screenshot of sample Agreement Desk Compare Documents results.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-new-comp-results.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MDAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.cLpkbyuoDdquODNzVoWLEHTkKuWGqQww67fSjJXgwWg&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of sample Agreement Desk Compare Documents results.")
8. Using the menu in the upper right, perform one of these actions

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Compare Documents finalization options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-comp-actions.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MDAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.cLpkbyuoDdquODNzVoWLEHTkKuWGqQww67fSjJXgwWg&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Compare Documents finalization options.")

   - From the vertical three-dot menu, select Save as New Version
     to directly save this comparison document as a new
     version.
   - Select Edit in Word to open the composite document
     and make changes.
   - Exit from the preview without changing or saving the document.

title: Agreement Desk Request Summarization (Beta)
text:
Learn how to use the Agreement Desk request summarization features to
summarize activity associated with a request.

Use the Agreement Desk Request Summarization feature to summarize
activity associated with a request. The agent presents a high-level overview
of the status along with key information such as owner, blockers, and next
steps.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select a request to open it.
3. Select Summarize This Request, located on the right-hand
   side of the Overview tab.

   ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-new-ai-summarize.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NjAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.ptU4kETk1QKypbVXqSnWk54zTpIhROOfh9ppRicn-mo&_LANG=enus)

   The AI agent summarizes the activity related to the request. When the
   agent finishes, it presents an overview with key information, such as key
   events, owner, blockers, and next steps.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Deskrequest summary.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-ai-summary.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NjAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.ptU4kETk1QKypbVXqSnWk54zTpIhROOfh9ppRicn-mo&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Deskrequest summary.")
4. Optionally select the page icon at the bottom of the summary to copy the
   response to the clipboard.
5. Select the X to close the AI agent window.

title: Create Custom Request Identifiers
text:
Learn how to createe a custom Agreement Desk request identifier to help you
improve discoverability, simplify customer communication, and improve overall request
tracking.

Create custom request identifiers that help you better organize and search
for requests in Agreement Desk.

Important:

Admins should keep these in mind when creating custom request identifiers:

- Admins can change the prefix at any time.
- Changing the prefix only updates the identifier for newly
  created requests. Existing requests keep their original identifier.
- You can only have 1 custom prefix per account.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select Settings > Admin.
3. In the Request identifier's Prefix Value field, select
   Edit.

   Select Reset to default to return the prefix value to
   REQ.
4. Enter a custom identifier for your account and select
   Save.

   ![A screenshot showing an example of creating a custom Agreement Desk Request identifier.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-cust-identifier.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNjYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.a5eHx8qjlxr3G_vJtAsRJK8sHTxxqhGPCJsu97KyJv4&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing an example of creating a custom Agreement Desk Request identifier.")

   The new identifier is created and a confirmation message
   displays.

title: Mark Agreement Desk Request Documents as Complete
heading_path: Mark Agreement Desk Request Documents as Complete
text:
Learn how to upload completed PDF documents signed on external platforms and manually
mark them complete (signed) within the request. This also enables viewing the completed
document in Agreement Manager.

As an Agreement Desk user, you may frequently collaborate with
external parties who may use third-party eSignature software (such as Adobe,
PandaDoc, SignNow) to finalize agreements.

Previously, only PDF documents signed directly through Docusign automatically flow from Agreement Desk into
Agreement Manager.

Now you can upload completed PDF documents signed on external platforms and
manually mark them complete (signed) within the request. This also enables viewing
the completed document in Agreement Manager.

Note:

Only PDF files can be manually marked as completed.

When you manually mark documents as complete:

- It replaces the most recent entry in the document version history.
  It also provides a link to the manually completed signed document in
  Agreement Manager (This is the current behavior with documents signed in Docusign).
- The activity is tracked in the request’s activity feed for audit
  purposes.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area to open the Requests
   dashboard.
2. Select and open a request.
3. Select the Documents tab.
4. For the document you want to mark as signed, select Mark Document
   as Complete from the vertical three dot menu.

   ![A screenshot showing the Mark document as complete dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-mark-complete-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzOTUsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.OQiKP9ZbpnH6PszR3vvCnkpI2-e3JUprJFdTeJEErfQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the Mark document as complete dialog box.")
5. Select Yes, mark as complete to set the document as
   completed in Agreement Desk and Agreement Manager.

title: Set Up Request Notifications
text:
Learn how to set up notifications for followers and submitters about the Agreement Desk activity.

You can set up notifications for followers and submitters about the Agreement Desk activity.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select Settings > Notifications to display the Notification  page.

   ![A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk Notifications Settings page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-not-page.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NTEsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.7SnrmV-WdBcEJRiggKvcypuFfvTsYM4Tx61feKziIZk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk Notifications Settings page.")

   Note: The Send a confirmation email to the submitter with a link to add more details option only applies to requests submitted through email.

title: Set Up Request Notifications
text:
Select the activities that generate email notifications to request
followers.

1. On the Notifications page, select the notification
   preferences link.
2. Select the dropdown menu for each category to display the notifications for
   each category.

   The categories include:
   - Envelopes
   - Requests
   - Completed Agreements

     ![A screenshot showing the followers' Docusign notification preferences link.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-notification-settings.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NTEsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.7SnrmV-WdBcEJRiggKvcypuFfvTsYM4Tx61feKziIZk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the followers' Docusign notification preferences link.")
3. Select notifications types:

   - Select the Select all Notifications checkbox
     to select all notifications in the category. You can toggle this
     feature on and off.
   - Select individual Notification types.

   For information about email notifications in Docusign
   accounts, see the [Manage Notification Preferences](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=jux1643235969954&topicId=dhc1578456326388.html&_LANG=enus)﻿ article.
4. Repeat for Requests and
   Completed Agreements notifications.
5. Select Save.

title: Set Up Request Notifications
text:
Use the sliders to toggle the submitter notifications.

Note: Only account users receive submitter notifications. Make
sure that the user is added to your account.

1. On the Notifications page, scroll down to the Submitter
   notifications section.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Submitter notifications section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-not-submitters.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NTEsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.7SnrmV-WdBcEJRiggKvcypuFfvTsYM4Tx61feKziIZk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Submitter notifications section.")
2. Optionally turn on or turn off the submitter notification options.

title: Manage Comments in Request Documents
text:
Learn about how to add, edit, delete, resolve, and respond to comments in an Agreement Desk request document.

Using Agreement Desk commenting features, you can discuss specific terms,
request input from request stakeholders.

title: Manage Comments in Request Documents
text:
You can add comments to a request document.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select the request that contains the document you want.
3. Select the Documents tab.
4. Select the document that contains your comments.
5. Select Preview from the vertical three-dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk preview menu selection.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-comm-preview.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.t3ZexJVYC-9KmYZx3BWo2PGkp9JO2yovTO9nf3QAmHU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk preview menu selection.")

   The document preview page displays, including any existing document
   comments.
6. Highlight some text in the document and select Add
   Comment.

   ![A screenshot of the request document preview menu selection.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-add-comment.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.t3ZexJVYC-9KmYZx3BWo2PGkp9JO2yovTO9nf3QAmHU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the request document preview menu selection.")
7. Enter a comment and select Post.

   You can optionally use the @mention to notify other users.

   ![A screenshot of a request dialog box using the @mention feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-complete-comment.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.t3ZexJVYC-9KmYZx3BWo2PGkp9JO2yovTO9nf3QAmHU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a request dialog box using the @mention feature.")

   The comment displays in the document viewer, as shown in this
   example.

   ![A screenshot showing an example of a document's comments in the request document viewer.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-comment-review.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.t3ZexJVYC-9KmYZx3BWo2PGkp9JO2yovTO9nf3QAmHU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing an example of a document's comments in the request document viewer.")

   Unresolved comments are listed on the right, and all resolved comments
   display on the left.

title: Manage Comments in Request Documents
text:
You can edit comments in a request document.

1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
4. Select Preview from the vertical three-dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.
5. Select the comment that you want to change.
6. Select the three-dot vertical menu and select
   Edit.
7. Make changes and optionally use the @mention feature to notify other
   users about your changes
8. Select Post.

   The changes to your comments display in the document viewer.

title: Manage Comments in Request Documents
text:
You can reply to comments and @mention additional people.

1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
4. Select Preview from the vertical three-dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.
5. Select the comment that you want to change.
6. Select Reply.
7. Add information and select Reply.

   You can also use the @mention feature to notify other users about your
   input.

   The changes to your comments display in the document viewer.

title: Manage Comments in Request Documents
text:
You can resolve any unresolved comments.

1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
4. Select Preview from the vertical three-dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.
5. Select the three-dot vertical menu and select the
   Resolve checkmark.

   ![A screenshot of the request document comment resolve feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-resolve-comment.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.t3ZexJVYC-9KmYZx3BWo2PGkp9JO2yovTO9nf3QAmHU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the request document comment resolve feature.")

   The comments are resolved and the changes from your comments are
   implemented.
6. If the subject matter for the comment is still under review, you can select
   the comment and select Unresolve.

title: Manage Comments in Request Documents
text:
You can review a summary of comments for a request
document.

1. Select the request that contains the document you want.
2. Select the Documents tab.
3. Select the document that contains your comments.
4. Select Preview from the vertical three-dot menu to
   display the document and its comments.

   ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-comm-preview.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.t3ZexJVYC-9KmYZx3BWo2PGkp9JO2yovTO9nf3QAmHU&_LANG=enus)

   ![]()

   The document preview page displays document comments.

   Unresolved comments are listed on the right, and all resolved comments
   display on the left.

   This example shows a document with unresolved comments.

   ![A screenshot showing an example of unresolved request document comments.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-comm-prev-unresolved.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MjYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.t3ZexJVYC-9KmYZx3BWo2PGkp9JO2yovTO9nf3QAmHU&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing an example of unresolved request document comments.")

title: Convert a PDF to a Word Document in Requests
heading_path: Convert a PDF to a Word Document in Requests
text:
Learn how to convert a PDF file to a Microsoft Word document in an Agreement Desk request.

You may want to mark up a document such as a contract, but the file in the Agreement Desk request is in PDF format. You can convert the PDF to a
Word document to mark up and edit the document.

1. From the Agreements page, select
   Requests

   The Requests dashboard opens.
2. Locate the request that you want to edit and select the request to open
   it.
3. Select the Documents tab.
4. Select the vertical three-dot menu and select Edit in
   Word.

   ![A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk request document Edit in Word menu option.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-new-convert-to-word-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzOTcsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.N7wQiWOyFYoAtN-ti493Fc_QxWh3hZT9FzzvtDR1omM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk request document Edit in Word menu option.")

   The document downloads to a `.docx` format.

   Note: Some PDF formatting may be lost in the conversion.

   Alternative Method

   When previewing a document, select Edit in Word to
   convert to the `.docx` format and download the document.
5. Use the word version to perform other request tasks.

   - Edit the word version of your document and [add it to requests](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=xzc1740514992382.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to add documents to an Agreement Desk request.").
   - Compare the document to other versions and other files, including PDF, as described in the [Compare
     Documents](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=tsk019a50de-2452-4f9a-a639-91c573a38cfa.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to compare Agreement Desk request documents to view the latest version of a document and immediately compare it to a different version.")  article.

title: Assign Followers to a Request
text:
Learn how to assign an interested party as a follower to an Agreement Desk request.

You can add followers to a Docusign
Agreement Desk request.

- Add them as a recipient from when you create a request.
- Add them to an existing request.

Note:

If you are an owner of a request, you are automatically a follower.

When an approval request lands in your inbox, select Reply
in the email message.

Your response is automatically captured and logged as a message in the
request’s activity feed for the entire team to see.

For information about Notifications, see the [Manage Notification Preferences](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=jux1643235969954&topicId=dhc1578456326388.html&_LANG=enus) article.﻿

1. Select Requests from the left navigation.

   The Requests dashboard opens.
2. To add a follower to a new request:
   1. Follow the instructions in the topic [Create a Request from the
      Dashboard](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=tpa1740514877858.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create a specific request type from the Agreement Desk Requests dashboard.").
   2. Select Add Recipient.
   3. Select Can View in the Access field.
3. To add a follower to an existing request:
   1. Follow the instructions in [Share
      Requests](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=tskf871e5e5-d006-4ec7-8043-dbdaa38578cb.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to share requests with other agreement desk users.").
   2. Select Can View in the
      Access field.

title: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
heading_path: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
text: Learn how unified fields work in Agreement Desk and how to use them as columns and filters on the Agreement Desk dashboard.

title: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
heading_path: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
text:
To use unified fields in search, you need:

- At least one Agreement Desk request type whose intake form includes unified fields.
- Permission to view requests of that type on the Agreement Desk dashboard.

Unified fields that are not used in any request types do not display in your data.
However, they may be available as column or filter options.

What are unified fields?
:   Unified fields are shared fields that you can add to Agreement Desk request
    forms to capture consistent data such as line of business, renewal type, or department
    . Each unified field has a name, a type (for example text, date, number, dropdown),
    and one or more values.

    Agreement Desk uses the unified field definitions from the central field
    library. Values you capture on intake can be
    reused across Agreement Desk,
    Agreement Manager, and other IAM
    features.

What can you do with unified fields in search?
:   On the Agreement Desk dashboard, you can now:

    - Add unified fields as columns, so you can see key request data in the table.
    - Filter requests by unified field values using an All filters panel.
    - Configure and save your own column layout so the dashboard opens with your preferred view.

For detailed information about IAM Unified Search, see the [IAM Unified
Search](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=conbd35fa9c-4ddb-4f01-be91-f55928fac98a.html&_LANG=enus)  article.

1. Select the Agreements tab in the top navigation.
2. Select Requests  to open the Requests
   dashboard.

   The main table of requests displays, with columns, such
   as Request title, Status, Last activity, Due date,
   Submitter, and Owner.
3. Add unified fields as columns.
   1. Select the column settings (gear) icon.
   2. Review the columns in the column settings
      panel:

      - Review the columns that are currently in use,
        shown in your current display order.
      - Scroll through the list of available columns.
        These include all standard unified fields in
        alphabetical order.
   3. Show or hide a unified field in the
      table.

      To show a unified field in the
      table:

      - Turn on the toggle next to that field name.
      - Optionally drag the field within the
        In use list to change its
        position in the table.

      To hide a unified field
      column, turn off the toggle next to
      that field name.

title: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
heading_path: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
text:
Use the All filters panel to
narrow the request list. You can use unified field values,
even when those fields are not visible as columns.

1. On the Agreement Desk dashboard, select
   All Filters.
2. In the filters panel, review the list of available
   filters.

   These include:

   - Core request properties (for example: status,
     owner, due date)
   - All available unified fields are configured
     for your organization.
3. Select a unified field filter.

   Depending on the field type, you see:

   - A single-select drop down
   - A multi-select list
   - A date or numeric selector
4. Choose one or more values to apply to that
   filter.
5. Repeat Steps 3 and 4 to add additional filters.
6. Apply the filters to update the dashboard table.

   Note:
   - You can filter on a unified field
     even if its column is currently hidden.
   - The filters you apply affect only
     your view and do not change the underlying request
     data.

title: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
heading_path: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
Reset columns to the default view
text:
You may have experimented with different column layouts
and want to go back to the default configuration.

1. Open the column settings (gear) icon.
2. Look for the option to reset columns to the default
   view (if enabled for your environment).
3. Confirm the reset.

After reset, you see the default columns (Request title
and identifier, Status, Last activity, Due date, Submitter,
Owner) in their original order.

title: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
heading_path: Use Unified Fields in Agreement Desk Searches
text:
Some Agreement Desk environments support
saving a configured set of columns and filters as a reusable
view or link.

1. Configure the dashboard:

   - Add or remove unified field columns
     as needed.
   - Apply filters in the All filters
     panel.
2. Look for a Save, Save
   view, or a similar control near the
   filters area.
3. Follow the on-screen prompts to:

   - Name the view
   - Copy a link to the current query for
     reuse or sharing

   Note:

   If you do not see a Save option,
   contact your administrator to confirm whether
   saved searches for Agreement Desk are
   enabled in your account.

title: Use Saved Search for Agreement Desk Requests
heading_path: Use Saved Search for Agreement Desk Requests
text:
Learn how to create customized searches to retrieve an updated list of requests that
match the search criteria.

You can create customized searches to retrieve an updated list of requests that match
the search criteria.

When you run the search, the search criteria (one or more request filter types) are
applied to the requests.

1. Select Requests from the left pane navigation to access
   the Requests dashboard.
2. Select the Show Hide icon to display filter fields to create the search criteria.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request search show or hide fields icon..](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-show-fields-icon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0OTIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.zV6JroYRjL8ja8sa4tsaYy1QkpXg4UGBp4D7cHWitnM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request search show or hide fields icon..")

   For example, you may select submitted by a specific
   user and unassigned.
3. Select the Save search text next to the Managed Search icon

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request Save Search feature.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-save-search-select.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0OTIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.zV6JroYRjL8ja8sa4tsaYy1QkpXg4UGBp4D7cHWitnM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request Save Search feature.")

   The New Saved Search dialog box displays.
4. Enter a name and description and select Save.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk new saved search.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-ss-db-complete.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0OTIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.zV6JroYRjL8ja8sa4tsaYy1QkpXg4UGBp4D7cHWitnM&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk new saved search.")
5. Optionally change your saved search by selecting the saved search icon. You
   can:
   - Select a recent search that is listed in dialog box
   - Select Manage saved searches
6. Select the vertical three dot menu and perform one of these actions:

   - Save New Version: Rename the search, but maintain the description.
   - Edit the name and description and select
     Update.
   - Delete: Select Delete in the confirmation
     message.

     Note: Deleting a search does not
     affect any requests.
7. Access your saved searches by selecting the bookmark icon.

   ![Agreement Desk saved searches icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-save-search-bkmark.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0OTIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.zV6JroYRjL8ja8sa4tsaYy1QkpXg4UGBp4D7cHWitnM&_LANG=enus "Agreement Desk saved searches icon.")

title: View All Agreement Desk Request Followers
heading_path: View All Agreement Desk Request Followers
text:
Learn how any user with access to a request can view a list of all other users actively
following that request.

Now, any user with access to a request can view a list of all other users
actively following that request. This ensures that they receive email notifications for updates and changes.

This feature provides:

- At-a-glance visibility: View up to three user avatars directly that
  display near the Follow button.
- Detailed follower support: Click on the avatars or the overflow
  count to display a full list of followers
- Dynamic updates: The follower list updates automatically.

Note: Owners of a request are automatically made a follower of the request. This ensures that owners automatically receive follower notifications.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area. The
   Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select a request to open it.

   In the menu bar, the followers’ avatars display next to the
   Follow and Share
   options.

   ![A screenshot showing an example of a Agreement Desk request's followers avatars in the menu bar.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-followers.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNDcsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.byDArIkwldztmu9mZp4Co1Ogaw817Q2JAt8Lax6UbPo&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing an example of a Agreement Desk request's followers avatars in the menu bar.")
3. 3. Select the avatars to view who is following the request, as shown in this
   example.

   ![A screenshot showing a sample Agreement Desk request 's followers information dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-new-view-fol-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNDcsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.byDArIkwldztmu9mZp4Co1Ogaw817Q2JAt8Lax6UbPo&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing a sample Agreement Desk request 's followers information dialog box.")

title: Agreement Desk Message Drafting
text:
Learn how to use the Agreement Desk message drafting feature to turn text
into a message form and capture the key points of the text.

title: Agreement Desk Message Drafting
text:
An administrator must enable AI agents for you to use this
feature.

Use the Agreement Desk Message Drafting feature to convert a request
status or a markup summary to an email. The AI agent turns text into a message form
and captures the key points of the text.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select a request to open it.
3. Create a summary as described in these topics.
   - [Agreement Desk Request Summarization](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=tsk26e57e79-af86-46b5-8842-45898d4499ca.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to use the Agreement Desk request summarization features to summarize activity associated with a request.")
   - [Agreement Desk Redline Summarization](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=tskebbad5d3-e278-4ae5-b42b-e4a04fa627a1.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to use the Agreement Desk Redline Summarization feature to summarize revisions and comments in Word documents, providing an easy way to track changes.")
4. When the summary completes, select the Draft a message
   icon at the bottom of the summary.

   ![A screenshot of selecting the AI agent Send Message icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-ai-send-msg-agent.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NjUsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.8g6bRusoHWigIUCP6nsr7W0sT85fU4MXz2hDlUVhzSc&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of selecting the AI agent Send Message icon.")

   The Send Message dialog box displays, with the content of the summary in
   the email.

   ![A screenshot of a sample AI Send Message dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-ai-send-ex.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NjUsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.8g6bRusoHWigIUCP6nsr7W0sT85fU4MXz2hDlUVhzSc&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample AI Send Message dialog box.")
5. Optionally change the email message and add email recipients.
6. Select Send to forward the summary information through
   email.

title: Manage Envelopes from Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to manage the contents of an Agreement Desk request's
envelopes.

title: Manage Envelopes from Agreement Desk
text:
Your permission profile must include Docusign Send (DS Sender) or Docusign Admin (DS Admin) privileges to perform these tasks.

When an Agreement Desk request includes an envelope, you can view and manage the
envelope and its documents from Agreement Desk.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select the request that contains the envelope you want.
3. Select the Envelopes tab to display the envelope
   details.

   ![A screenshot of an Agreement Deskrequest's envelope page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-envelope-details-pg.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzODgsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.K3ypY0s022LsT_Vq1Yc_sEW2GGcudveRljR1LzCNYXk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of an Agreement Deskrequest's envelope page.")
4. Select the envelope you want to manage to display the envelope's detail page.
5. Select one of these activities:
   - View recipients by selecting the Recipients tab
     (default display).
   - View envelope details by selecting the Details  tab.
   - Depending on the envelope status, Send or Resend the envelope.
   - Select a thumbnail of associated documents to view the
     document.
   - Select Certificate to download the envelope's
     [Certificate of Completion](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=oeq1643226594604&topicId=gpa1578456339545.html&_LANG=enus). This certificate
     includes the identifying information about the envelope and complete details
     of the envelope events.
   - Using the three-dot menu next to the envelope to select additional actions.

     ![A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk request envelope action menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-envelope-pg-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzODgsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.K3ypY0s022LsT_Vq1Yc_sEW2GGcudveRljR1LzCNYXk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk request envelope action menu.")

     - Details : View envelope details, such as
       envelope name and ID, sender, and send history.
     - Void: Void the envelope as described in the
       [Void an Envelope](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=oeq1643226594604&topicId=zyn1578456424164.html&_LANG=enus)  article.
   - Select the overflow menu (the three dot menu) at the top of the page to
     view more envelope management options as described in the topic [Complete Envelope
     Activities](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=tske30a78d7-9149-47e5-9270-32a8a4934cb0.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to manage and complete envelope activities from a DocusignAgreement Desk request.").

     ![A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk envelope additional action menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-envelope-det-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzODgsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.K3ypY0s022LsT_Vq1Yc_sEW2GGcudveRljR1LzCNYXk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk envelope additional action menu.")

title: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
heading_path: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
text:
You must have Docusign administrator (DS Admin) privileges or
Agreement Desk settings manager permissions privileges for your
account.

This feature simplifies administrative tasks by transferring complex
request type and status settings between different Docusign
instances (such as Demo and Production environments.)

With this feature, administrators can easily package up and move all the
complex rules for request types and their workflow steps (statuses).

For example, you created or changed several request types, and you want to
use these across all the accounts you administer. You can export the information to
a .zip file, and import the settings to other accounts.

title: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
heading_path: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
text:
Export request types and status settings for an
account.

1. Select Agreements  > Requests  > Settings.
2. Select Request types.
3. Select Export from the top menu.

   ![A screenshot of the Docusign Import and Export menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-admin-imp-export.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MDAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.aZTS1jEpflodThn47mGbNZVsR_UgD_6XYDJrG21dW5g&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign Import and Export menu.")
4. In the Export dialog box, select all or specific request types to export,
   and select Export.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Export request types dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-admin-export-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MDAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.aZTS1jEpflodThn47mGbNZVsR_UgD_6XYDJrG21dW5g&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Export request types dialog box.")

   Depending on the number of request types you selected, this could take
   several seconds.
5. When the export completes, a file download dialog box displays. Select the
   location for the export zip file.
6. Select Settings > Statuses.
7. Repeat the previous steps to export Status information for your
   account.

title: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
heading_path: Import and Export Request Type and Status Settings
text:
Import request types and status settings to use for your accounts.

1. Select Agreements  > Requests  > Settings.
2. Select Statuses.
3. Select Import from the top menu.

   ![A screenshot of the Docusign Import and Export menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-admin-imp-export.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MDAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.aZTS1jEpflodThn47mGbNZVsR_UgD_6XYDJrG21dW5g&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign Import and Export menu.")
4. In the Import dialog box, drag (or select) a request type zip file to the
   Select file area.

   ![A screenshot of the Docusign Import request types dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-admin-import-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI1MDAsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.aZTS1jEpflodThn47mGbNZVsR_UgD_6XYDJrG21dW5g&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Docusign Import request types dialog box.")
5. Select Import.

   Depending on the number of request types you selected, this could take
   several seconds.

   When the import successfully completes, the `Import
   completed` message displays.
6. Select Settings > Statuses.
7. Repeat the previous steps to import Status information to your
   account.

title: Complete Envelope Activities in Agreement Desk
heading_path: Complete Envelope Activities in Agreement Desk
text: Learn how to manage and complete envelope activities from a DocusignAgreement Desk request.

title: Complete Envelope Activities in Agreement Desk
heading_path: Complete Envelope Activities in Agreement Desk
text:
Your permission profile must include Docusign Send (DS Send) or Docusign Admin (DS Admin) privileges to perform these tasks.

You can manage and complete envelope activities from a DocusignAgreement Desk request.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select the request that contains the envelope you want.
3. Select the Envelopes tab to display the envelope
   details.
4. Select the envelope that you want to manage and select Details from the
   menu.

   The envelope's recipients and Details tab
   display.
5. At the top of the page, select the overflow menu (the three dot menu) to manage
   the envelope.

   ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-envelope-det-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzOTEsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.37G3ajtqbibPoAnxZHuaSXJA-gEab5ylultBrF0sKK8&_LANG=enus)
6. Perform one of these envelope actions:
   - History: Displays the envelope's history as described in the article
     [Check Docusign envelope
     history](https://support.docusign.com/s/articles/How-do-I-check-the-envelope-history).
   - Form data: Displays a summary of the envelope's information.
   - Export as CSV: Select to download the envelope's information in CSV
     format.
   - Delete: Deletes the envelope.
   - Download: Downloads the envelope's documents. You can select one or more
     documents to download.
   - Print: Prints the envelope's documents.

title: Forward Messages
text:
Learn how to forward Agreement Desk messages.

You can forward a message to other users. When you forward a message, recipients see a
notification in their email inbox and can reply to the email or directly in Agreement Desk. Responses are captured in the request.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Open a request from the Requests page.

   The Request Detail page displays.
3. In the request Activity Feed, select Forward.

   ![A screenshot of an example showing forwarding an Agreement Deskrequest.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-forward-msg.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.Dlkt5x71fr-v2XXpPm8LpIfFevX-ta8sbXSb40ygDZQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of an example showing forwarding an Agreement Deskrequest.")
4. Select a recipient from the list in the To  field.
5. Enter a message for the recipient.
6. Optionally select Attach  to add documents to the
   message. You can upload it from your computer or select a document associated
   with the request.
7. Select Send.

Your message is forwarded, and is reflected in the Activity
Feed. The recipient receives an email with the message and any
attachments.

If
the Account Admin turns on message participation, you cal add recipients who are
not in your account to the message. See the topic [Actions Permitted By Permission
Level and Role](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?topicId=oiu1731179949375.html&_LANG=enus)﻿ for more information.

title: Agreement Desk Redline Summarization (Beta)
text:
Learn how to use the  Agreement Desk Redline Summarization feature to
summarize revisions and comments in Word documents, providing an easy way to track
changes.

Use the Redline Summarization
feature
to summarize revisions and comments in Word documents, providing an easy way to track
changes.

Note: nly tracked changes or comments contained in a Word document display in the summary.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select a request to open it.
3. Select Documents.
4. For the document you want to review, select Summarize changes
    from the vertical three dot menu.

   ![A screenshot of selecting Summarize changes from the Agreement Desk request document actions menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-ai-markup-sum-menu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.J7iN4LbS7u4Ii7_mVSV2crV4nRXG0Oa3Ezy4bRycSnk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of selecting Summarize changes from the Agreement Desk request document actions menu.")

   The AI agent panel opens and displays the changes in the document.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk request document markup summary.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-ai-markup-sum-results.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.J7iN4LbS7u4Ii7_mVSV2crV4nRXG0Oa3Ezy4bRycSnk&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk request document markup summary.")
5. Optionally select one of these options to capture the summary:
   - Copy response copies the summary to the
     clipboard.
   - Draft a message about this summary creates an email that includes the
     summary as described in [Agreement Desk Message Drafting](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=tskb9bdd359-8691-4eb6-a0a4-e562a81aea92.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to use the Agreement Desk message drafting feature to turn text into a message form and capture the key points of the text.").

title: Review Agreement Desk Request Reports
text: Learn about using report insights for viewing detailed information about Agreement Desk requests.

title: Review Agreement Desk Request Reports
text:
You need account admin privileges to view all request insight data. Users can only view information for requests they're authorized to access.

You can view statistics about Agreement Desk request statuses with the Report Insights feature.

You can now:

- Build, filter, and export detailed request reports.
- Perform deep-dive analysis on request status, volume, and custom fields (such as ARR or Region).

For information about managing Docusign Agreement Desk request reports, see the  [Agreement Manager Request Report Dashboards](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5&topicId=con1fc88284-aff5-46c9-ac08-15db3839fce8.html&_LANG=enus)  article.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select the Reports insights icon (![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Request page Report Insights icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-insights-icon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NzksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.6MoVlXS4wQ7KWS_lK3CYmfCvjTf2p0N4Dmsh_7F_26k&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Request page Report Insights icon.")) to display the Insights dialog box, as shown in this example.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement DeskRequest Insights request status report.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-newest-request-insite-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NzksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.6MoVlXS4wQ7KWS_lK3CYmfCvjTf2p0N4Dmsh_7F_26k&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement DeskRequest Insights request status report.")

   The Insight display shows a visual representation color-coded by
   request statuses types. Details include:

   - Number of each status type
   - Percentage of each status type
   - Detailed information about a status type when you hover your cursor over
     a specific graph bar
3. Select Go to Reports to view reports dashboards.

   The Requests Insights page displays, as shown in this example.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Reports Request Dashboard page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-latest-report-pg.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI0NzksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.6MoVlXS4wQ7KWS_lK3CYmfCvjTf2p0N4Dmsh_7F_26k&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Reports Request Dashboard page.")
4. Customize the report data.
   - Completed date: Select the time frame for when
     the requests were completed.
   - Request type: Select one or more request type.
   - Customize the report display by selecting View as
     table or

     View as chart
   - Make this request view a favorite by selecting the star icon.

title: Share Requests
text:
Learn how to share requests with other agreement desk users.

You can share Agreement Desk requests with other Agreement Desk users.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation.

   The Requests dashboard opens.
2. Locate the request that you want to edit.
3. Select a request to open it.
4. Select Share in the upper right corner to acess the
   Share with others dialog box.

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request Share with Others dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-share-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNDksInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.Vm_xqNp4HwP4i3woFGxbhb2fD3lCweIresMgD2Anqus&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk request Share with Others dialog box.")
5. Begin typing the name of the user you want to add and select it.
6. In the Access field select an Acess permission.
7. Optionally select Copy Link to obtain a link for the
   request.
8. Select Save.
9. Repeat for other users that you want to share this request.

title: Notifications About Changes to Requests
text:
Read about how internal request submitters receive updates about changes to Agreement Desk activities.

If you create an Agreement Desk request and if you are an internal user, you
might automatically receive notifications when updates to your request occur.

Updates include changes to owner, due date, and status, for example. Internal users are
those who have an account within the system. External users do not receive notifications
regarding their submitted requests.

For request creators to be automatically notified, an administrator must turn on Submitter notifications in Agreement Desk settings. If your administrator has Submitter notifications turned off, you can still receive updates by following the request.

To follow a request, you must have View permission or higher. If another user shares a request with you, you are automatically granted View permission.

For instructions about following a request, see the topic [Get Notified about Changes to Requests](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=ent1747168477311.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to stay informed of changes to specific Agreement Desk requests by using the Follow option.").

title: Create a Request through Email
text:
Learn how to create anAgreement Deskrequest directly from your
email.

You can easily create an
Agreement Desk request from your email by sending
or forwarding an email, with or without an attachment, to Agreement Desk default or customized email address.

Note:

When submitting requests through email, only users within your account receive
confirmation email. External users do not receive this notification.

1. Send a new or forward an existing email addressed to the Agreement Desk email
   for your organization.

   See the topic [Locate your Agreement Desk Email Address](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5&topicId=xlg1741793314719.html&_LANG=enus) for information.
2. Add a subject, body, and optionally attach documents (that are automatically
   added to the Documents list in the request) and send the
   email.

   Submitters that are in the account may receive the confirmation email with a
   link to complete the request intake form.

   Alternatively, users can go to the Requests  dashboard
   to view the new request, that may take a minute or so to show up.
3. Select your request to open it.

title: Create a Request through Email
text:
Update your request by assigning an owner, due date, and
creating an approval.

title: Edit Requests
text:
Learn how to edit Agreement Desk requests to change the title, status,
due date, and owner.

You can edit an Agreement Desk request to change its title, status,
owner, and due date.

1. On the Agreements page, select
   Requests.
2. Locate the request that you want to edit.

   You can sort and filter requests to find the one you want. For more information, see the topic
   [Search and Filter Requests](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=yrc1740515145178.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to search Agreement Desk requests, filter, and sort requests to locate the ones you need.").

   ![A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Requests page.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-latest-req-ex.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzMzUsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.HXllSxNtM52Jp_G8rx7OyEQjJcxlvfW4velZTFKWdy8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Agreement Desk Requests page.")
3. Select the request to open it.

   The request's Overview page displays.
4. Select the pencil icon in the Information section to
   display the Edit request information dialog box.

   ![A screenshot of the Edit request information dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ac-req-edit-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzMzUsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.HXllSxNtM52Jp_G8rx7OyEQjJcxlvfW4velZTFKWdy8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Edit request information dialog box.")
5. Edit the following information:

   - Title: Change or replace the title text in the
     Title field.

     You can enter a text-only
     title to serve as the request's official designation within Agreement Desk and throughout IAM.
   - Status: Select a different status from the
     Status menu.
   - Request type: Enter the for the request type.
   - Due Date Select a new date from the date picker
     or enter it directly into the Due Date
     field.
   - Submitter: A licensed participant who submits the
     request. Select the name from the list that is presented as you type.
   - Owner: A licensed participant who submits the request. Select the name from the list that is presented as you type.

     Note:
     - Each user can only be assigned one license. User access to Docusign features is dependent on the account plan, the license type, and the user permission profile.
     - Only users with Edit permissions can access
       request information.
     - If you want to replace a current owner, select the
       X next to the name.
6. Select Save.

title: View Documents Associated with Agreement Desk Requests
heading_path: View Documents Associated with Agreement Desk Requests
text:
Learn how to view the documents associated with Agreement Desk requests.

You can view documents associated with an Agreement Desk request.

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. Select a request and select the Documents tab.

   Documents associated with the request are listed by title. Columns
   provide the status, date the document was added, and the name of the user who
   added it.

   ![A screenshot of an documentss associated with an Agreement Desk request.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-add-docs.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNzYsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.BnxKpXcRYW7ge5_0-S3JNhYvVWA5lFo7UaZolIhgZ8w&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of an documentss associated with an Agreement Desk request.")

   Documents can be one of these statuses:
   - **Draft**: The document has not changed.
   - **Signed**: The document was signed through a Docusign eSignature
     envelope.
3. (Optional) Add a document, generate a document, or send a document for signature. Or take action on a specific document, such as downloading it.

title: Add Documents to Agreement Desk Requests
heading_path: Add Documents to Agreement Desk Requests
text:
Learn how to add documents to an Agreement Desk request.

You can add documents to an Agreement Desk request by uploading the
documents from your local environment or by creating them from a template.

Note: You can add only one document
at a time from the Requests page.

You can add your own document to a request, including those that don't require
document generation. For example, you may want to include documents such as exhibits
or sheets in your request.

You can also use your documents to create templates. Using your own templates ensures
that your users obtain approved templates for your organization.

1. Select Requests from the left pane navigation to access
   the Requests dashboard.
2. Select the Documents tab.

   ![A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk Documents tab.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-add-docs.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.0Cr3GcnkDFlIeUNdpnTjFc32DtsXEIQpWmvy-Yb941Y&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing the Agreement Desk Documents tab.")
3. Select Add Document and choose one of these
   methods.
   - Upload document: Upload a new document
   - Upload new version: Upload a new version of the
     current document
   - Use document template
     1. In the
        Select
        document template dialog box, search for or select a
        template from the list and select Add
        Selected.

        ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Select document template dialog box.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-select-template-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNzEsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.0Cr3GcnkDFlIeUNdpnTjFc32DtsXEIQpWmvy-Yb941Y&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk Select document template dialog box.")
     2. Complete the Add Field Data section and select
        Generate.
     3. On the Generate field page, select  Highlight
        Data or Don't Highlight
        Data.
     4. Select
        **Next**
        to generate a template from your
        document.

title: Permissions By License Type
text:
Read about the permission levels and capabilities for free and full user licenses. The actions you can take with Agreement Desk requests and AI-Assisted Review (AIAR) playbooks differ by license type and level of permission.

In Agreement Desk, interaction with requests and [AI-Assisted Review](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=confef1b68e-4d95-443d-a51c-7b04377874b9.html&_LANG=enus) playbooks differs by your
license type and permission level.

Agreement Desk offers two user license types: free and full. Each license type
has different levels of permissions, as outlined in these tables.

To submit an Agreement Desk request, the submitter needs to a user on a Docusign account used by Agreement Desk.

The user can be a Free User or Full License User.

For information about how to grant permissions to users, see the topic [Grant Agreement Desk Permissions to Users](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapf0ca9167-3825-4b36-a385-e98321f7adb5&topicId=tsk01779417-0383-47c8-b2a2-78f2a19df672.html&_LANG=enus).

For information about Docusign permissions, see the topic [Permission Profile Options](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390&topicId=mfo1583277360424.html&_LANG=enus)﻿.

Table 1. Free User License

| [1](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=yao1749836146880.html&_LANG=enus&anchor=fntarg_1) Permission level | Request capabilities | Playbook permission |
| --- | --- | --- |
| View | - View - Share - Add messages - Approve or reject approvals - Download documents | No |
| Edit | Includes all View request capabilities, plus these additional capabilities:  - Edit forms - Upload documents | No |

Table 2. Full User License

| [2](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=yao1749836146880.html&_LANG=enus&anchor=fntarg_2) Permission level | Request capabilities | Playbook permission |
| --- | --- | --- |
| View | - View - Share - Add messages - Approve or reject approvals - Download documents | No |
| Edit | Includes all View request capabilities, plus these additional capabilities:   - Edit forms - Upload documents | No |
| Manage | Includes all Edit and View request capabilities, plus these additional capabilities:   - Change approvals - Change status - Update request information | Yes, when enabled by an admin |
| Manage all requests in the account1 | Manage-level access | Yes (View access) |
| Configure Agreement Desk settings1 | Manage-level access | Yes (View and Manage access) |

[1](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=yao1749836146880.html&_LANG=enus&anchor=fnsrc_1) Set on the Admin page.

[2](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&bundleId=msb1736279079453&topicId=yao1749836146880.html&_LANG=enus&anchor=fnsrc_2) Set on the Admin page.

title: Search and Filter Requests
text:
Learn how to search Agreement Desk requests, filter, and sort requests
to locate the ones you need.

You can search, filter, and sort Agreement Desk requests to locate the
requests you need.

![A screenshot of Agreement Desk request filter options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-filter-options.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNDIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.v_6UjsZfkfcjtwSh8AGZVeAk829nZIS8S-mBn450PQ8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of Agreement Desk request filter options.")

1. Select Requests from the left navigation area.

   The Requests dashboard displays.
2. In the search box, enter a text in the search box and select
   Enter to see the resulting matches.

   ![A screenshot of an Agreement Deskfilter request entry for MSA.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-filter-db.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNDIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.v_6UjsZfkfcjtwSh8AGZVeAk829nZIS8S-mBn450PQ8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of an Agreement Deskfilter request entry for MSA.")
3. (Optional) Filter the results to narrow your search by selecting from one or more of
   the following options.
   - Status Type: Select Open or
     Closed.
   - Status: Select from specific statuses for open and closed
     requests. The options listed include custom statuses.
   - Request type: Select from the request types listed to narrow
     results to only those types.
   - Owner: Select a name from the list of request owners. The owner
     is assigned by the request submitter.
   - Submitter: Select a name from the list of users who created the
     requests shown in the dashboard.
   - Created at: Select from pre-defined date ranges enter a custom
     date range.
   - Last Activity At: Select from a pre-defined date range or enter a
     custom date range.
   - Due Date: Select from a pre-defined date range or enter a
     custom date range.
4. (Optional) Sort the results by selecting the arrows shown in this example for one or
   more column headings to see the information alphabetically or by date in ascending or
   descending order.

   ![A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk request column head filter.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/msb1736279079453/page/images/ad-req-sort-arrows.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjIzNDIsInNoZWFmIjoibXNiMTczNjI3OTA3OTQ1MyJ9.v_6UjsZfkfcjtwSh8AGZVeAk829nZIS8S-mBn450PQ8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample Agreement Desk request column head filter.")

Select a request from the list of results to open it.
